calendar.matters:
Petitionfor Kathleen Brick Truatee, For Order Directing The Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llc, To Convey Personal Property Belonging To Petitioner; Etc.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petitionfor Kathleen Brick Truatee, For Order Directing The Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llc, To Convey Personal Property Belonging To Petitioner; Etc.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Continued To Sep-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thu Nguyen for and with Kathleen Brick.

The Court noted that the beneficiaries signed a disclaimer and an assignment, and informed the parties that once a disclaimer is signed you can no longer assign it. Ms. Nguyen requested that the court declare the disclaimer ineffective. The Court stated that the course of action requested is not possible because the beneficiaries signed the papers. Ms. Nguyen requested a continuance. The Petition for Kathleen Brick Trustee, for order directing the Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC, to Convey Personal Property, etc was continued to September 09, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
